info.title: Canvas LMS API
info.description: Canvas LMS REST API by Instructure. Provides access to courses, assignments, users, enrollments, submissions, grades, modules, pages, files, discussions, and more.

get.description: Returns the paginated list of active courses for the current user
Return information on a single course

delete.description: Delete or conclude an existing course

get.description: Shows details for a user
Returns user profile data
Returns a list of users

post.description: Create and return a new user

get.description: Returns the list of enrollments for a course

post.description: Enroll a user in this course

get.description: Returns the list of assignments for the course

post.description: Create a new assignment for this course

get.description: Returns the assignment with the given id
Returns submissions for the assignment

post.description: Make a submission for an assignment

get.description: Get a single submission

put.summary: Grade or comment on a submission
put.description: Comment on and/or update the grading for a submission

get.description: Returns the list of modules for a course

post.description: Create and return a new module

get.description: Get a single module

put.description: Update and return an existing module

get.description: Returns items in a module

post.description: Create and return a new module item

get.description: Returns wiki pages
Retrieve the content of a wiki page

put.description: Update the title or contents of a wiki page

get.description: Returns the paginated list of files for the course
Returns the standard attachment json object
Returns the paginated list of discussion topics
Returns data on an individual discussion topic
Retrieve the paginated discussion entries

post.description: Create a new entry in a discussion topic

get.description: Returns the list of quizzes in this course

post.description: Create a new quiz for this course

get.description: Returns the quiz with the given id
Returns recent grading activity
Returns the list of accounts
Retrieve information on an individual account
Retrieve the paginated list of calendar events

post.description: Create and return a new calendar event

get.description: Get a single calendar event

put.description: Update and return a calendar event

get.description: Returns the list of conversations for the current user

post.description: Create a new conversation with one or more recipients

get.description: Returns information for a single conversation
